fields.name: TCS
fields.description: Tata Consultancy Services — India's largest IT services company.

fields.name: Infosys
fields.description: Global leader in consulting, technology and outsourcing.

fields.name: Wipro
fields.description: Leading technology services and consulting company.

fields.name: Capgemini
fields.description: Global business and technology transformation partner.

fields.text: [TCS - Medium] A train 180m long passes a pole in 9 seconds. Find its speed in km/h.
[Quantitative Aptitude] If A:B = 3:5 and B:C = 2:7, find A:C.
[TCS English] Choose the correct synonym of 'ABATE'.
fields.explanation: Abate means to reduce or diminish.

fields.text: [Quantitative Aptitude] What is the time complexity of binary search?
fields.explanation: Binary search halves the search space each step → O(log n).
Differences: +4, +6, +8, +10 → next is 20+10=30.

fields.text: [TCS - Medium] A train 180m long passes a pole in 9 seconds. Find its speed in km/h.
[Quantitative Aptitude] If A:B = 3:5 and B:C = 2:7, find A:C.
[TCS English] Choose the correct synonym of 'ABATE'.
fields.explanation: Abate means to reduce or diminish.

fields.text: [Quantitative Aptitude] What is the time complexity of binary search?
fields.explanation: Binary search halves the search space each step → O(log n).
Differences: +4, +6, +8, +10 → next is 20+10=30.

fields.text: [TCS - Medium] A train 180m long passes a pole in 9 seconds. Find its speed in km/h.
[Quantitative Aptitude] If A:B = 3:5 and B:C = 2:7, find A:C.
[TCS English] Choose the correct synonym of 'ABATE'.
fields.explanation: Abate means to reduce or diminish.

fields.text: [Quantitative Aptitude] What is the time complexity of binary search?
fields.explanation: Binary search halves the search space each step → O(log n).
Differences: +4, +6, +8, +10 → next is 20+10=30.

fields.text: Q1. A shopkeeper marks an article 40% above cost price and gives 10% discount. Profit % is?
fields.explanation: MP = 140, SP = 140×0.9 = 126 → profit 26% on CP 100. (standard placement level for Accenture.)

fields.text: Q2. Pipe A fills a tank in 12 h, Pipe B in 18 h. Together they fill it in?
fields.explanation: Combined rate 1/12 + 1/18 = 5/36 → time = 36/5 = 7.2 h. (standard placement level for Accenture.)

fields.text: Q3. Average of 5 numbers is 27. If one number 35 is replaced by 15, new average is?
fields.explanation: Sum drops by 20 → new sum 135-20=115 → avg 115/5=23. (standard placement level for Accenture.)

fields.text: Q4. Simple interest on ₹8000 at 5% for 3 years is?
fields.explanation: SI = P×R×T/100 = 8000×5×3/100 = ₹1200. (standard placement level for Accenture.)
36=2²×3², 84=2²×3×7 → HCF = 2²×3 = 12. (standard placement level for Accenture.)

fields.text: Q1. If CLOUD is coded as DMPVE, how is RAIN coded?
fields.explanation: Each letter +1: R→S, A→B, I→J, N→O. (standard placement level for Accenture.)

fields.text: Q2. Find the odd one out: Square, Triangle, Circle, Rectangle
fields.explanation: Circle has no straight sides; others are polygons. (standard placement level for Accenture.)

fields.text: Q3. A is taller than B. C is shorter than B. Who is shortest?
fields.explanation: A > B > C → C is shortest. (standard placement level for Accenture.)
Multiply by 3 each time → 81×3 = 243. (standard placement level for Accenture.)

fields.text: Q5. If South-East becomes North, North-East becomes West, what does South become?
fields.explanation: 135° anti-clockwise rotation → South (180°) becomes North (0°). (standard placement level for Accenture.)

fields.text: Q1. Choose the word nearest in meaning to 'PRAGMATIC'.
fields.explanation: Pragmatic means practical and realistic. (standard placement level for Accenture.)

fields.text: Q2. Fill in the blank: He abstained _____ voting in the election.
fields.explanation: Correct phrase: abstain from (something). (standard placement level for Accenture.)

fields.text: Q3. Identify the error: 'Each of the boys have submitted their forms.'
fields.explanation: 'Each' takes singular verb → 'has submitted'. (standard placement level for Accenture.)
Verbose = using too many words; concise = brief. (standard placement level for Accenture.)

fields.text: Q5. Rearrange meaning: P / nation / the / built / leaders / by / was / great
fields.explanation: Correct sentence: The nation was built by great leaders. (standard placement level for Accenture.)

fields.text: Q1. What is the output of: print(2 ** 3 ** 2)?
fields.explanation: Exponent is right-associative: 2**(3**2) = 2^9 = 512. (standard placement level for Accenture.)

fields.text: Q2. Which data structure uses FIFO order?
fields.explanation: Queue: First In First Out. (standard placement level for Accenture.)

fields.text: Q3. Time complexity of accessing an element in array by index?
fields.explanation: Arrays allow O(1) random access by index. (standard placement level for Accenture.)

fields.text: Q4. Which keyword is used to define a constant in C?
fields.explanation: C uses 'const' for read-only variables. (standard placement level for Accenture.)

fields.text: Q5. Output of: for(i=0;i<3;i++); printf('%d',i); in C?
fields.explanation: Loop runs i=0,1,2 then i becomes 3 → prints 3. (standard placement level for Accenture.)

fields.text: Q1. Which layer of OSI model handles routing?
fields.explanation: Network layer (Layer 3) handles routing. (standard placement level for Accenture.)

fields.text: Q2. Primary key in a database table must be?
fields.explanation: Primary key uniquely identifies rows; cannot be NULL. (standard placement level for Accenture.)

fields.text: Q3. Deadlock occurs when processes are?
fields.explanation: Circular wait for resources causes deadlock. (standard placement level for Accenture.)
404 = requested resource not found. (standard placement level for Accenture.)

fields.text: Q5. In OOP, hiding internal details is called?
fields.explanation: Encapsulation bundles data and hides implementation. (standard placement level for Accenture.)

fields.text: The nation was built by great leaders
Great leaders was built the nation
The great nation built by leaders
